description: chargePayment passes an Idempotency-Key header in its POST; emitWebhook and sendNotification omit the header.

findings.rationale: chargePayment is structurally near-identical to emitWebhook and sendNotification (single POST to the processor with a request body) but adds an Idempotency-Key header. The header is load-bearing: without it, network-retry on payment endpoints causes duplicate charges, a customer-visible financial bug. An agent that normalises onto a shared post() will drop the header unless warned.
